changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO technology_categories (id, organization_id, name, description, created_by_id, updated_by_id) VALUES (101, 105, 'Hardware - Server', 'Server', 161, 161) , (102, 105, 'Software - SAP', 'SAP', 161, 161) , (103, 105, 'Middleware Web Service', 'Web Service', 161, 161) , (104, 105, 'Appliance', 'Appliance', 161, 161) , (105, 105, 'Network', 'Network', 161, 161) , (106, 105, 'Database', 'Database', 161, 161) , (107, 105, 'Mobile', 'Mobile', 161, 161) , (108, 105, 'Cloud Service', 'Cloud Service', 161, 161) , (109, 105, 'Software - HR', 'Software - HR', 161, 161) , (110, 105, 'Endpoint', 'Endpoint', 161, 161) ;
ALTER SEQUENCE technology_categories_id_seq RESTART WITH 1024;
